_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Conflicting signals—bullish stablecoin accumulation vs. bearish macro fear and analog divergences—keep us anchored in Anxiety chop until either a breakout above $70K with rising MVRV or a breakdown below $60K with spiking VIX forces a leg change.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls HOLD/Sideways at low conviction; narrative writer implies accumulation bottom with bullish lean at high confidence. Split favors analyst per trust weights but narrative keeps upside bias alive.
next_move.confirmed_if: BTC breaks $70K with ETF flows sustaining and MVRV Z-score crossing above 35, shifting phase to Hope and signal to LONG.
next_move.invalidated_if: BTC breaks below $60K with VIX spiking above 20 and funding turning negative, shifting phase to Panic and signal to REDUCE or SHORT.
